summary: Frontend-only deep test of Issues #3 (Documentation), #4 (Integrations Marketplace), #5 (Live Demos + Templates), #6 (Command Center), #7 (RBAC Team) + cross-page smoke across 21 routes. All public + dashboard routes loaded HTTP 200 with zero pageerror events. Login flow working with admin@oraone.ai. All requested data-testids and interactions verified.
verifications: Issue #3 /documentation — 7 sidebar items (Quick Start, Product Docs, API Reference, Integrations, Security & Compliance, Help Center, Status & Support) present via data-testid doc-nav-{quickstart|products|api|integrations|security|help|status}. NOTE: actual testids use short ids (quickstart/products/api/help/status) not the kebab-case names in the spec (quick-start/product-docs/api-reference/help-center/status-support) — implementation is correct, spec wording was different. PASS

Issue #3 — product-tab-voice/chat/whatsapp present and clickable; code-lang-* count = 12 (4 endpoints × 3 langs); integration-toggle-* count = 7 and clicks expand panel; faq-search filters list (4 results for 'voice'); 'All systems operational' visible. PASS

Issue #4 /app/integrations — Integration Health shows 6 health badges (spec said 5 — extra is fine, content choice not a bug); Marketplace renders 17 int-card-* with status pills; int-search filters cards (1 result for 'gmail'); 10 int-cat-* category filters; int-card-gmail opens int-detail-drawer with 4 int-toggle-gmail-* toggles and Test/Disconnect buttons; webhooks table present; API Usage shows Requests Today / Error Rate / Avg Response Time; Sync Activity present. PASS
Issue #5 /products — voice-demo, voice-dashboard, voice-flow, chat-demo, chat-snippet, chat-snippet-copy (click works), whatsapp-demo, wa-dashboard all rendered. PASS

Issue #5 /templates — 6 template cards, 6 preview buttons, 6 deploy buttons. Preview opens template-preview-modal with Agent Prompt, Conversation Flow, Use Cases, template-preview-deploy button. template-preview-close closes modal. PASS (note: actual deploy/preview testids are template-{slug}-deploy / template-{slug}-preview, not template-repo-deploy-live-* as in spec)

Issue #6 /app/overview — 5 snapshot-* KPIs, 4 attn-leads/failed/kb/int alert cards, qa-create-agent / qa-upload-kb / qa-connect-wa / qa-invite-team / qa-export-leads quick-actions all present and qa-create-agent navigates to /app/agents/new; Agent Performance Leaderboard, Live Activity, Lead Funnel, Channel Breakdown, Quick Actions, Upcoming Tasks, ROI sections all rendered. PASS

Issue #7 /app/team — team-stat-total/active/pending/admins all present; 6 member rows (data-testid=`member-{id}`); 3 invitation rows; permission-matrix, role-preview with role-pick-owner/admin/manager/viewer all present and clickable; activity-log, audit-logs tables present; invite-cta opens invite-modal, name+email inputs + invite-role-* pills work; invite-submit closes modal. PASS

Loader — OraOneLoader.jsx exports default OraOneLoader + ButtonSpinner + InlineLoader + DotsLoader + ChatTyping + Skeleton + CardSkeleton + TableSkeleton + EmptyStateLoader + ProgressStages + TopProgressBar + PageTransition. data-testid='oraone-loader' present. No console errors from loader. PASS

Cross-page smoke — 12 public routes (/, /products, /solutions, /integrations, /templates, /pricing, /documentation, /case-studies, /about, /contact, /login, /signup) and 9 dashboard routes (/app/overview, /app/agents, /app/conversations, /app/leads, /app/analytics, /app/knowledge-base, /app/integrations, /app/team, /app/settings) all returned 200, no pageerror events captured, no ErrorBoundary fallback shown. PASS
console_warnings_observed: Hydration warning 'In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <option>' on /app/leads and /app/knowledge-base. Source is the Visual-Editor instrumentation injecting display:contents spans inside <option> elements (markers: x-excluded='true', data-ve-dynamic='true', x-source-file pointing to Leads.jsx line 253 / KnowledgeBase.jsx line 227). This is dev/preview tooling output, not from production source code, and does not produce pageerrors or visual breaks. Non-blocking, but worth noting to main agent.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: spec used different data-testid naming (e.g., doc-nav-quick-start vs actual doc-nav-quickstart, template-repo-deploy-live-preview vs actual template-{slug}-preview). Implementation is consistent internally and correct; consider aligning future spec docs with actual short-ids.

Minor (dev-only): hydration warnings on Leads.jsx select options and KnowledgeBase.jsx select options come from preview Visual-Editor span injection inside <option>. Not a real product bug, but if these warnings clutter production console, consider switching Leads/KB rows-per-page <select> to a shadcn Select component or restructuring so the editor doesn't wrap option children with <span>.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend-only iteration 4: all 6 issues (#3-#7 + loader + cross-page smoke) verified green. No fixes were applied. Backend testing was explicitly skipped per request. Hydration warnings from preview Visual-Editor instrumentation on Leads/KB <select> options are pre-existing and not blockers — flagged for awareness only.
